title: coppensia viperina
intro: Coppensia viperina, also known as the "viper's bugloss", is a plant species in the borage family (Boraginaceae) native to the Mediterranean region. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate the immune system and reduce inflammation. The leaves and flowers of the Coppensia viperina plant are used to make herbal preparations, which are said to offer various health benefits, including antioxidant and antibacterial properties. Traditionally, the plant's extracts have been used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, and to aid in wound healing and skin conditions.
